hero.title:
Building
excellence
in the North.
hero.subtitle: Since 2015, Nord Invest Madagascar designs and executes your construction, studies and design, water drilling and real estate projects with rigor and expertise.

about.title:
Technical
expertise at the
service of your projects.
about.lead: Founded in 2015 in Antsiranana, Nord Invest Madagascar specializes in construction, water drilling and real estate. We apply our technical expertise to guarantee modern, sustainable and cost-effective infrastructure.
about.feat1Desc: We work with registered architects to ensure regulatory compliance and architectural quality.
about.feat2Desc: Safety is our absolute priority. We rigorously apply standards to guarantee a safe working environment.
about.feat3Desc: Use of professional software (AutoCAD, ArchiCAD, Revit, Robot Structural) for precise and compliant studies.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: "To become a reference player in the building and real estate sector in Madagascar and Africa."

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: "To carry out studies, construction works and real estate services with professionalism, quality and respect for standards."

standards.title:
Engineering at the heart
of every structure.
standards.lead: We apply the most demanding international and local standards to guarantee the longevity of your investments.
standards.item1Desc: Absolute priority to the safety of people and equipment. Marked work zones, mandatory PPE and regular procedure checks.
standards.item2Desc: Our studies integrate Madagascar's Extreme Wind (VEx 1 to 4) standards. Every structure is calculated to withstand the specific cyclone conditions of the North.
standards.item3Desc: Use of market-leading software: AutoCAD, Revit and ArchiCAD for design, and Robot Structural Analysis for load calculation validation.
standards.item4Desc: Support for obtaining building permits. Systematic collaboration with approved architects registered with the National Order of Architects.

services.title:
What we
deliver for you.
services.lead: A complete offering, from design to delivery, for individuals, NGOs, companies and institutions.
services.card1Desc: Complete architectural and structural design, execution plans, BIM modeling (Revit, ArchiCAD), structural calculations (Robot Structural). Compliance with Madagascar's VEx standards.
services.card2Desc: Complete technical studies: concrete/steel structure, roads and networks (VRD), drinking water supply (AEP), soil study, sizing and quantitative estimates.
services.card3Desc: Structural work, finishing, turnkey. Villas, residences, buildings, institutional buildings. Site monitoring and quality control at every stage.
services.card4Desc: Complete architectural and structural design, execution plans, BIM modeling (Revit, ArchiCAD), structural calculations and project support.
services.card5Desc: Preliminary geophysical study, drilling, equipping and commissioning. Water supply for individuals, municipalities and NGOs throughout northern Madagascar.
services.card6Desc: Full support for land, residence and building sales and purchases. Local expertise, legal and administrative advice included.
services.card7Desc: Technical inspection at every stage of the site. Material verification, compliance with plans and standards. Dedicated civil engineers for your project supervision.

pricing.title:
Clear pricing,
per square meter.
pricing.lead: Our prices are in Malagasy Ariary (Ar) per m² with EUR and USD conversion. They vary according to the finishing grade, project complexity and location. Custom quote on request.
pricing.note: Important note: The prices shown are reference prices excluding taxes. The actual cost depends on site access conditions, soil type, available local materials and your project specifics. A free personalized quote with no obligation is provided after a site visit. Contact us at 032 82 312 80 or by email.
pricing.priceNote: Reference price. Custom quote after site visit.

calculator.title:
Estimate your
budget in one click.
calculator.lead: Select your options to get an instant budget estimate based on our current rates.
calculator.resultNote: * This estimate is provided for indicative purposes only. It does not replace a formal quote after a technical visit.
calculator.placeholder: Configure your project on the left to get a preliminary estimate.
calculator.alertInvalidSurface: Please enter a valid surface area.

team.title:
Experts
at your service.
team.lead: A team of 34 passionate technicians and engineers, mobilized for your projects throughout northern Madagascar.
team.desc1: 15 years of experience in civil engineering and project management.
team.desc2: Expert in concrete structures and seismic calculations (VEx).
team.desc3: Revit, ArchiCAD and sustainable design specialist.
team.desc4: Site coordination, planning and quality control.

values.desc1: Strict compliance with Malagasy and international standards. Collaboration with approved architects for durable and compliant structures.
values.desc2: Safety is our golden rule. Protective equipment, marked zones and regular checks for accident-free sites.
values.desc3: Employment and training of local technicians. Use of local materials to support the economy of the Diana and SAVA regions.

blog.title:
Tips &
construction news.
blog.lead: Discover our technical tips, practical guides and news about construction, drilling and real estate in Madagascar.
blog.excerpt1: Understand the Extreme Wind standards that apply in northern Madagascar and why they are essential for your construction.
blog.excerpt2: Key steps, costs and tips for successful water drilling in Antsiranana, Nosy Be and throughout the region.
blog.excerpt3: Administrative procedures and practical advice for buying land in Antsiranana and northern Madagascar.

newsletter.title: Stay Informed
newsletter.desc: Receive our news, technical tips and special offers by email. No spam, unsubscribe at any time.
